tags.description: Located at 0°N 0°E. The buoy ("Station 13010 – Soul") was part of the PIRATA system, a set of 17 buoys installed in the tropical Atlantic Ocean since 1997 by the United States, France, and Brazil.

tags.disused:seamark:name: Atlas Buoy
tags.name: Soul Buoy
